query:
INSERT INTO app_accounts (app_key, app_name, app_url, signup_url, emoji, category, is_paid, has_family_tier, sort_order, notes, created_at)
VALUES (
  'education_com',
  'Education.com',
  'https://www.education.com',
  'https://www.education.com/join/',
  '🏫',
  'learning',
  0,
  1,
  15,
  'Worksheets, games, and activities for K-8. Sign in with Google (spear.cpt@gmail.com). Free tier includes printable worksheets and online games.',
  NOW()
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  app_name = VALUES(app_name),
  app_url = VALUES(app_url),
  signup_url = VALUES(signup_url),
  emoji = VALUES(emoji),
  notes = VALUES(notes);
